sentences.arabic: مَرِضْتُ قَلِيلًا فِي مُنْتَصَفِ رِحْلَتِي وَاحْتَجْتُ إِلَى طَبِيبٍ.
sentences.translation: Malo sam se razbolio usred putovanja i trebao mi je liječnik.
sentences.translationEn: I fell slightly ill in the middle of my trip and needed a doctor.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ فِي الْفُنْدُقِ عَنْ أَقْرَبِ عِيَادَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Upitao sam u hotelu za najbližu ambulantu.
sentences.translationEn: I asked at the hotel about the nearest clinic.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الطَّبِيبِ وَشَرَحْتُ لَهُ أَعْرَاضِيَ بِالْإِنْجِلِيزِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam kod doktora i objasnio mu simptome na engleskom.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the doctor and described my symptoms in English.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ لِيَ وَصْفَةً وَذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ الدَّوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Napisao mi je recept i otišao sam u apoteku kupiti lijek.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote me a prescription and I went to the pharmacy to buy the medicine.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ وَاحِدٍ تَحَسَّنَتْ حَالَتِي وَاصْطَلَحْتُ رِحْلَتِي.
sentences.translation: Nakon jednog dana moje stanje se popravilo i nastavio sam putovanje.
sentences.translationEn: After one day my condition improved and I continued my journey.
